[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: The image shows a game-style “LEVEL UP!” progress screen with a circular avatar on the left and multiple level and XP indicators across a dark, purple-themed interface.

Main Subject:
A user interface panel displays the heading “LEVEL UP!” at the top, the text “alok ep ep” in the center-left area, and a highlighted badge reading “#333.” Below these, there are large blocks showing “LEVEL 2” on the left and “EXPERIENCE 10 / 150” on the right, along with a horizontal progress bar and percentage “6%.” Smaller stat boxes below read “MESSAGES 7,” “XP NEEDED 140,” and “NEXT LVL 3,” and there is a faint message at the bottom.

Setting:
This appears to be a digital interface on a dark, gradient background with a large rounded rectangular container centered on the screen. The style suggests a gaming/achievement or profile level-up overlay, with no real-world environment shown.

Visual Details:
The background is dark purple to black with subtle gradients. The main panel is a rounded rectangle with a slightly lighter dark border. The top heading “LEVEL UP!” is in bright yellow with surrounding decorative corner-like marks. The username “alok ep ep” is white, centered near the top-left portion of the panel. The badge “#333” is inside a small rounded yellow outline pill near the username. A circular avatar appears on the left, containing a busy anime-style illustrated scene with multiple small images around the edges; a purple ring outlines the circle. The “LEVEL 2” box has a dark background with white text and a large numeral “2.” The “EXPERIENCE 10 / 150” box has a teal-green background with white text and a larger “10 / 150.” A thick horizontal progress bar sits below, with a small purple fill on the left and the remaining track in a darker gray-blue; the “6%” appears to the right of the bar. Three smaller boxes sit beneath the progress bar: the “MESSAGES” box has a dark background with white text and the number “7,” the “XP NEEDED” box shows “140,” and the “NEXT LVL” box shows “3.” At the bottom center of the panel, faint text reads “Congratulations on leveling up!”.

Visible Text:
LEVEL UP!
alok ep ep
#333

2
LEVEL PROGRESS
EXPERIENCE
10 / 150
6%

Congratulations on leveling up!

Practical Summary:
The image is a level-up dashboard showing the current level, experience progress, and related stats for a user. It includes a progress bar with 6% completion and indicates the next level and remaining XP needed.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
